data.current_description: Upload a media asset (image, video, document) for use in posts and messages.
data.description_suggestion: Upload a media asset (image, video, or document) to store for use in posts and messages. Accepts multipart form data with the asset file. data.current_description: Send a reply to an existing inbound or outbound message. The reply is threaded to the original conversation.

Returns a MessageResponse with the sent message ID and status. The message is immediately queued for delivery and may include attachments or custom fields.

data.current_description: Send a reply to an existing inbound or outbound message. The reply is threaded to the original conversation.
data.description_suggestion: Send a reply to an existing inbound or outbound message, maintaining conversation threading. Requires the original message ID and reply content in the request. The reply is automatically threaded to the original conversation on the source channel. Returns a MessageResponse with the reply message ID and status. Supports attachments and maintains the conversation context across the channel.

data.current_description: Delete a specific message by its ID. This may also delete the message from the source channel if supported.
data.description_suggestion: Delete a specific message by its ID. Removes the message from Sprinklr and, if supported by the channel, also deletes it from the source channel (e.g., social media platform). Returns a confirmation response. Note: Deletion may not be possible for all message types or channels. Deleted messages cannot be recovered.
